creator: winter@jurai.net
text:
On Mon, 27 Mar 2000 ecco@lugu.org wrote:
> During installation, the 3c509 is correctly found and initialized, but
> when it comes to Network configuration, it freezes after saying "Yes"
> to "Do you want to bring up the ep0 interface right now?". A cold
> reboot seems to be the only possible solution. The same thing happens
> if I answer "No" to the above question and instead run ifconfig
> manually. The same card works fine on Linux, OpenBSD, Windows for
> Workgroups 3.11/DOS and Windows 95.

Make sure you disable all non-present hardware drivers in the visual user
config.
